name: gilmore-ec.github.io
description: Portfolio Website hosted through GitHub Pages.

scripts.minify-html: html-minifier-terser src/index.html --collapse-whitespace --output=out/index.html && html-minifier-terser src/about.html --collapse-whitespace --output=out/about.html && html-minifier-terser src/projects.html --collapse-whitespace --output=out/projects.html && html-minifier-terser src/resume.html --collapse-whitespace --output=out/resume.html && html-minifier-terser src/contact.html --collapse-whitespace --output=out/contact.html
scripts.optimize-css: postcss src/assets/main.css --use autoprefixer cssnano postcss-pxtorem --output out/assets/main.css --no-map && postcss src/assets/body.css --use autoprefixer cssnano postcss-pxtorem --output out/assets/body.css --no-map
scripts.build: npm run minify-html && npm run optimize-css && npm run transpile-js && npm run minify-js

author: Gilmore-EC
